summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdsGupta Dashboard - Backend API (21/21 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all core features verified). JWT auth, KPI dashboard, AI Insights with Gemini 3 Flash, and Amazon SP-API connection flow all working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 400 when LWA_CLIENT_ID not configured - expected behavior but may need user-friendly error message

issues: Minor: Period selector shows static 12%, 8%, -2%, 5% change values regardless of actual data changes (hardcoded placeholders)

critical_code_review_comments: KPI card change percentages (12%, 8%, -2%, 5%) are hardcoded in DashboardPage.jsx - should be calculated from actual data or removed until period comparison data is available
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality verified working. Backend APIs pass all 21 tests. Frontend login, dashboard KPIs, AI Insights (Gemini 3 Flash), Amazon connection status, Financial Summary all functional. Mobile responsive design verified. Amazon SP-API OAuth flow structure complete but requires LWA credentials for full connection testing (MOCKED).

mocked_apis.note: Amazon SP-API OAuth flow requires real LWA credentials to complete. The OAuth redirect and callback structure is implemented but actual Amazon API calls will fail without LWA_CLIENT_ID and LWA_CLIENT_SECRET configured.
mocked_apis_list: Amazon SP-API OAuth connection (LWA credentials not configured)
Amazon Reports API polling (background worker implemented but no real data)

passed_tests: - Auth endpoints (7): login, login_invalid, register_duplicate, register_new, me_auth, me_unauth, logout
- Amazon endpoints (4): status_not_connected, connect_missing_credentials, status_unauth, redirect_uri
- AI Insights endpoints (5): insights_success, insights_empty, latest, history, unauth
- Dashboard page loads at /tools with login CTA
- Auth modal opens on 'Login with AdsGupta' click
- JWT login works with test credentials
- Dashboard shows 8 KPI cards (Total Sales, Sessions, Conversion Rate, Buy Box %, PPC Spend, ACOS, TACOS, ROAS)
- Amazon Account section shows 'Not connected' with redirect URI
- AI Insights generates Gemini 3 Flash recommendations on refresh
- Financial Summary section displays all metrics
